rationale: Section 45.258 governs school district bond payment failure notification to the commissioner. It does not reference or depend on homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No direct conflict exists.
quote: Immediately following a determination that a school district will be or is unable to pay maturing or matured principal or interest on a bond for which credit enhancement is provided under this subchapter, but not later than the 10th day before maturity date, the school district shall notify the commissioner.
_note: No direct interaction between this notification rule and the proposed homestead exemption increase. Indirect fiscal pressure on school districts is possible but not a statutory conflict.
